mapper.select: SELECT R.RES_ID, R.COM_ID, R.RES_CODE, R.RES_NAME, R.RES_TYPE, R.QUANTITY, R.LOCATION, R.CAPACITY, R.RES_STATUS, E.EMP_ID AS managerEmpId, E.EMP_NAME AS managerEmpName, E.EMP_NO AS managerEmpNo, EP.POS_ID AS managerPosId, EP.POS_NAME AS managerPosName, R.REMARK, R.CREATED_AT, R.UPDATED_AT, COUNT(RV.REV_ID) AS RESV_COUNT FROM COM_RESOURCE R LEFT JOIN RESERVATION RV ON R.RES_ID = RV.RES_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON R.MANAGER_EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN EMP_POSITION EP ON EP.POS_ID = E.POS_ID WHERE R.RES_ID = #{resId} GROUP BY R.RES_ID, R.COM_ID, R.RES_CODE, R.RES_NAME, R.RES_TYPE, R.QUANTITY, R.LOCATION, R.CAPACITY, R.RES_STATUS, E.EMP_ID, E.EMP_NAME, E.EMP_NO, EP.POS_ID, EP.POS_NAME, R.REMARK, R.CREATED_AT, R.UPDATED_AT ORDER BY R.res_id DESC
SELECT * FROM COM_RESOURCE CR WHERE CR.COM_ID = #{comId} AND CR.RES_STATUS = 'AVAILABLE' -- 사용가능 AND CR.QUANTITY > 0
